resources.string: Screen is mirrored with a CRT filter. Tap to open settings or stop from the app.
Allow "Display over other apps" first — opening settings…
Screen capture was not granted. CRT filtering needs it to process the picture.

This app captures the screen at full resolution and re-draws it through a GPU CRT filter at a low emulated resolution (default 640×480, extended to fill the display).

Effects include curvature, scanlines, RGB slot mask, phosphor bleed, bloom, and vignette — pixel art will look as intended on a CRT.

1) Allow "Display over other apps". 2) Set the emulated CRT size (width × height). 3) Tap Start — allow screen capture.

Touch is not reliable while the overlay is on; use a gamepad or stop the overlay.

On Xiaomi / Poco (HyperOS): if the overlay list is empty, use "Open app info", then Other permissions → Display over other apps.
